pi_items.metadata_value: Real Bacillus subtilis (AL009126.3) genomic sequence and experimentally verified sigma-A -10 promoter elements
pi_items.verified_value: Real Bacillus subtilis (AL009126.3) genomic sequence and experimentally verified sigma-A -10 promoter elements
pi_items.source: Checked setup_task.sh which dynamically downloads the AL009126.3 genome via NCBI eutils and generates 10 well-known Bacillus subtilis promoter elements (veg, amyE, aprE, etc.).
Verified the exact string lengths of the 10 fasta sequences hardcoded in setup_task.sh (e.g. AAAGGTTATAATGAA) are precisely 15 bp.
Verified from the task description instructions and export_result.sh which explicitly checks the summary text for the string '85%'.
Verified from export_result.sh glob pattern matches and task description instructions.
Verified from explicit path check in export_result.sh and task description instructions.
Verified from explicit path check in export_result.sh and task description instructions.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real biological data (Bacillus subtilis AL009126.3 downloaded from NCBI and 10 known experimentally verified promoter sequences). The exact required target threshold is 85%, and the expected promoter motif length is 15 base pairs. The required output files explicitly match the provided paths: sigmaA_matrix.pwm, predicted_promoters.gff, and search_summary.txt located in /home/ga/UGENE_Data/promoters/results/.
